TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pasikau, title = Pasikau, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pasikau} }

S.FORM: alang Pasikau ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 332 buwan, 1,145 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 1,021 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 124 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, з¬¬11 . qalang Pasikau ga maki 2 pqwasan biru. qalang Pasikau ga maki 1 khu skwan biru. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Pasikau hya' ga Talunas. tay 'zil na Pasikau hya' ga Kainisungan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pasikau ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Pasikau ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 332 buwan, 1,145 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 1,021 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 124 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, з¬¬11 . qalang Pasikau ga maki 2 pqwasan biru. qalang Pasikau ga maki 1 khu skwan biru. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Pasikau hya' ga Talunas. tay 'zil na Pasikau hya' ga Kainisungan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pasikau ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. khu skwan biru maki 1 khu skwan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕ‹ pas~Й•ikau ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku tajto keЕ‹ atu ЙЈenД§eК”i ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa *** ОІuwan, *,*** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *,*** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕ‹ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa, *** . qalaЕ‹ pas~Й•ikau ЙЈa maki * pqwas~Й•an ОІiru. qalaЕ‹ pas~Й•ikau ЙЈa maki * kД§u s~Й•kwan ОІiru. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj mkrajaК” na pas~Й•ikau Д§jaК” ЙЈa talunas~Й•. taj К”zil na pas~Й•ikau Д§jaК” ЙЈa kainis~Й•uЕ‹an. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj qalaЕ‹ pas~Й•ikau ЙЈa uЕ‹at kjokaj. s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj maki * pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj. pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” mrkjas~Й• maki * pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” mrkjas~Й•. kД§u s~Й•kwan ОІiru maki * kД§u s~Й•kwan ОІiru. tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕ‹an na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
